description_long: This modern multi-story house features a clean, rectangular design with flat roofs and large windows, maximizing natural light and outdoor connectivity. The front facade includes a covered carport, wood panel accents, and a balcony with planters, while the upper levels offer spacious terraces with outdoor seating and greenery. The rear of the house reveals open staircases, additional balconies, and a rooftop area, all surrounded by glass railings and minimalist landscaping. The side elevations are mostly solid, with a few vertical window strips and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing privacy. The house is constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with touches of wood and greenery for warmth. Its overall aesthetic is sleek, functional, and well-suited for urban environments.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large windows, balconies, and a covered carport, featuring clean lines and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered carport, wood accents, balconies with planters, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view with mostly solid walls, minimal windows, and visible terrace and rooftop spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting open staircases, multiple balconies, rooftop area, and glass railings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with vertical window strips, additional balconies, and landscaped pathways.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a recessed door under a covered carport, with steps, wood panel accents, and minimal decorative elements.
